case_title: VALENTINA TOPTYGINA VS. FEOG DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA (SAN FRANCISCO), LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAR-19-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2020 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO APR-01-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VALENTINA TOPIYGINA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER ANGELIKA RYAN, DAUGHTER. DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA (SAN FRANCISCO)LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIEL BERTOLETE, GENERAL RESTAURANT MANAGER. MS RYAN WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW THE PLAINTIFF TO SUBPOENA THE DOCTOR WHO TREATED THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ORDER RE:CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR, PLAINTIFF FILED NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE ACTION ON MARCH 17, 2021. (W. TRUPEK, D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY TOPTYGINA, VALENTINA AS TO DEFENDANT FEOG DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA (SAN FRANCISCO), LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2019 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JAN-10-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES WITH WORKING PHONE NUMBERS ON FILE WERE ADVISE. PLAINTIFF VALENTIA TOPTYGINA IS PRESENT (ALTHOUGH PREVIOUSLY INFORMED). DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER THE JUNE 10,2021 ORDER.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TOPTYGINA, VALENTINA
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOPTYGINA, VALENTINA AS TO DEFENDANT FEOG DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA (SAN FRANCISCO), LLC.
